title: elatine hydropiper var. gyrosperma
intro: Elatine hydropiper var. gyrosperma, also known as water wort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the family Elatinaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of water wort include relieving pain and swelling, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions, and its leaves and stems are used in folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
